evidence: AC1 - Data model entities verified: requirement_headers, customer_demands, requirement_snapshots, creator_supply_offers, supplier_bindings, selection_results, send_operations, risk_audit_events, feedback_audit_events, offer_promotion_events declared in database.json with scopeFields (scope_type, scope_id) and lateDataFields (observed_at, effective_at, received_at, as_of_at, late_data_cutoff_at, is_late, late_reason) in commonFieldPolicies.

AC2 - Recovery split: workflow.json contains refresh, request, finalize phases; allowed_actions present with server-authoritative state — test 'splits recovery into refresh, request, and finalize without event authorization' and 'makes persisted server state and allowed_actions authoritative' both PASS.

AC3 - Requirement dictionary: requirement-dictionary.json declares dictionaryVersion '2026-07-12.1', dictionaryHash sha256, contentPolicy.containsCustomerContent=false, forbiddenContent includes customer-message/customer-brief/customer-content; requirements.json references dictionary.path, dictionary.version, dictionary.hash. AC4 - Value policies: requirements.json valuePolicies locks budget, rebate, three deadline types; processingPolicies defines constraint grammar, join gate, late data lifecycle, offer promotion lifecycle. Tests 'locks budget, rebate, three deadlines, and single-platform splitting', 'defines a closed constraint grammar and exact join gate', 'freezes late data and versions offer promotion' all PASS.

AC5 - Output contracts: mcp.json has output contracts for all 15 tools. Workflow state matrix in workflow.json declares closed state-combination matrix. Test 'gives every ordinary tool one closed output contract' and 'declares a closed state-combination matrix for every phase' PASS.

AC6 - Boundaries: database.json readinessStatus='external-unverified'; requirements.json governance sets legacyProfileCapability='detection-only', databaseDeploymentStatus='external-unverified', productionReadiness='NO-GO', algorithmReadinessRequiredForProduction=true. Test 'keeps algorithm, deployment, legacy, and production readiness boundaries closed' PASS.

Scope drift: all 23 changed files within allowed paths (spec/, docs/, tests/, YPmcn/src/contract/, YPmcn/tests/); no changes outside these directories. Worktree remained clean before and after verification.
